title: Butchery LITE
description: A lightweight version of the Butchery mod.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.imgchest.com/files/0dfe69bafcb7.png)
![Image](https://cdn.imgchest.com/files/793c6ef076c7.png)

## **🔪 What is Butchery?**

Butchery LITE is a very lightweight version of Butchery. It only contains a handful of mobs that you would usually kill to obtain food. This version has removed a lot of the full mod and only contains basic features such as obtaining carcasses, hanging and bleeding then butchering for vanilla meats.

## **🥩 Features**
If you found this mod first but want to try the full version of Butchery, you can click the link below.
[https://modrinth.com/mod/butchery](https://modrinth.com/mod/butchery)

## **🐖 Currently Included Mobs & Bosses**
- Chicken
- Cod
- Cow
- Goat
- Hoglin
- Pig
- Rabbit
- Salmon
- Sheep

**## 🤩 Support Me**

Creating this mod is taking me a lot of time and effort, if you'd like to support me and supply me with tasty italian fuel to continue with this mod and my others you can buy me a pizza by clicking the link below!
